checks.message: A supported Chrome/Edge browser executable was found.
The browser exposed a DevTools websocket endpoint.
The browser smoke handled the panel confirmation prompt in-page.
The panel log updated with the quick-start run id.
The quick-start click created the expected run-state.json file.
The quick-start flow created a spec.snapshot.json file.
The panel status endpoint reports the new run after the browser click.
The browser-triggered run reached completed status.
The generated summary artifact satisfies the required smoke assertions.
The browser-triggered quick start reached a completed autonomous summary.
The browser UI log shows a completed quick-start outcome.
